equivalence_spec.accept_equivalence_if: 90% CI for risk difference lies wholly inside [-margin,+margin]

H_4H_RSI_LOW.eligibility: filled and h4_bars >= 10 and h4_rsi nonmissing

H_SCORE_INVERSE.direction: lower score is positive; evaluate AUC(-score)

locked_targets.Y_POST_STOP: Y_DISCOVERY and not Y_TRADABLE; used only for H_BEHAV_REARM

power.method: statsmodels NormalIndPower using Cohen h from proportion_effectsize; two-sided z approximation

train_only_rule.reverse_2026_to_2025: sensitivity only; never call it forward OOS
